summary_en:
Lifelong Washingtonian and Uniting Our Youth Executive Director Clarence Miles proudly endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 DC Council.

Miles says Jackie is a leader who genuinely cares about her community, understands residents' needs, and knows how to get things done. Having watched her rise from the ground up through years of public service, he has seen firsthand her dedication, work ethic, and commitment to delivering results.

That's why Clarence doesn't just recommend Jackie for one term, he recommends her for two.

Watch his endorsement and learn why he believes Jackie Reyes-Yanes is the right choice for Ward 1.
summary_es:
Clarence Miles, residente de toda la vida de Washington, DC y Director Ejecutivo de Uniting Our Youth, respalda con orgullo a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Concejo de DC por Ward 1.

Miles afirma que Jackie es una líder que realmente se preocupa por su comunidad, entiende las necesidades de los residentes y sabe cómo lograr resultados. Después de verla abrirse camino desde cero a través de años de servicio público, ha sido testigo de su dedicación, esfuerzo y compromiso con la comunidad.

Por eso Clarence no solo la recomienda para un período, sino para dos.

Mira su respaldo y descubre por qué considera que Jackie Reyes-Yanes es la mejor opción para Ward 1.
title_en: Clarence Miles Endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 DC Council
title_es: Clarence Miles respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Concejo de DC por Ward 1
source: Clarence Miles - Lifelong Washingtonian and Uniting Our Youth Executive Director
